name: Career Repo
onCreateCommand: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && ~/.local/bin/uv venv --clear venv && . venv/bin/activate && ~/.local/bin/uv pip install -e . && cd ui && npm install
postStartCommand: export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && . /workspaces/career-repo/venv/bin/activate && cd /workspaces/career-repo && nohup python3 api/main.py > /tmp/api.log 2>&1 & nohup bash -c 'cd /workspaces/career-repo/ui && npm run dev' > /tmp/ui.log 2>&1 &
